$comment: This file is generated via firehose. DO NOT edit by hand. Make any changes required using the firehose repo instead.
title: metadataGpsMnavEphemeris
description: MNAV Ephemeris describing GPS satellite locations.  Definitions and usage are covered in ICD-GPS-200L, Section 20.3.3.4 and following, with additional military use definitions and usage covered in ICD-GPS-700D.

timeOfValidity.description: time_of_validity: Time at which the measurement is considered to be valid.

weekNumber.description: week_number: Full GPS week number calculated from the Modulo 1024 WN in Subframe 1 and the number of GPS week rollovers  Units: weeks

clock.description: clock: GNSS broadcast parameters required to calculate sv clock corrections.

orbit.description: orbit: Keplerian orbit parameters required to calculate satellite position.

aDot.description: a_dot: Change rate of semi-major axis.  Units: m/s

deltaAf0.description: delta_af_0: SV clock bias correction provided by the Mnav Message Correction (MMC).  Units: s

deltaAf1.description: delta_af_1: SV clock drift correction provided by the Mnav Message Correction (MMC).  Units: s

deltaGamma.description: delta_gamma: Ephemeris parameters correction provided by the Mnav Message Correction (MMC).  Units: radians

deltaI.description: delta_i: Angle of inclination correction provided by the Mnav Message Correction (MMC).  Units: radians

deltaOmega.description: delta_omega: Angle of Right Ascension correction provided by the Mnav Message Correction (MMC).  Units: radians

deltaA.description: delta_a: Semi-major axis correction provided by the Mnav Message Correction (MMC).  Units: m

iscL1ME.description: isc_l1_m_e: L M1_E to L1 P(Y) inter-signal correction.  Units: s

iscL2ME.description: isc_l2_m_e: L M2_E to L1 P(Y) inter-signal correction.  Units: s

iscL1MS.description: isc_l1_m_s: L M1_S to L1 P(Y) inter-signal correction.  Units: s

iscL2MS.description: isc_l2_m_s: L M2_S to L1 P(Y) inter-signal correction.  Units: s

isaL2Py.description: isa_l2_py: L2 P(Y) to L1 P(Y) inter-signal accuracy index.

isaL1ME.description: isa_l1_m_e: L M1_E to L1 P(Y) inter-signal accuracy index.

isaL2ME.description: isa_l2_m_e: L M2_E to L1 P(Y) inter-signal accuracy index.

isaL1MS.description: isa_l1_m_s: L M1_S to L1 P(Y) inter-signal accuracy index.

isaL2MS.description: isa_l2_m_s: L M2_S to L1 P(Y) inter-signal accuracy index.
